description: This pipeline annotates incoming data with values from a table and then adds new columns to the annotated data, allowing for optional replacement of existing columns if needed, resulting in an enhanced dataset.

8cd283d6-7885-49de-b1a7-a016f44f1bbb.name: table-add-columns-generate
8cd283d6-7885-49de-b1a7-a016f44f1bbb.description: Adds a new column. By default no changes are applied if the column already exists. Can be optionally configured to replace existing columns.

352b8a99-195d-46b6-a95e-931b6e579389.name: annotate-data-with-table-values
352b8a99-195d-46b6-a95e-931b6e579389.description:
Annotates the incoming data with values from the input table

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
